title: Aquarius
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on performance, visuals, and quality-of-life improvements. Designed to enhance the vanilla experience with better FPS and subtle tweaks—perfect for players who want a smoother, cleaner game without changing gameplay.
body:
**🌿 Vanilla Refined: A Lightweight Performance & QoL Modpack**
Summary:
A meticulously curated Fabric modpack focused on enhancing performance, visual quality, and quality-of-life—all while staying true to the vanilla Minecraft experience. Perfect for players who want a smoother, cleaner game without sacrificing the core charm of Minecraft.

**🧩 What Does This Modpack Add?**
This modpack is built for players who want Minecraft to run better, look cleaner, and feel smoother, without altering core mechanics or overwhelming the experience with unnecessary features. Ideal for both single-player and multiplayer use.

**🚀 Performance Enhancements:**

- Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore – Drastically improve FPS and performance through rendering, physics, and memory optimizations.
- Distant Horizons – Extend your view distance with level-of-detail rendering.
- EntityCulling, Dynamic FPS, Krypton, ImmediatelyFast – Remove lag and increase responsiveness in all scenarios.

**✨ Visual & Aesthetic Enhancements:**

- Iris + Reese’s Sodium Options – Add shader support with an easy-to-navigate settings menu.
- Zoomify + BetterF3 + OrthoCamera + StarHUD – Modernize your HUD and camera controls.
- 3D Skin Layers + Particle Rain + Smooth Scroll – Subtle visual upgrades that preserve the vanilla aesthetic.

**🔧 Quality-of-Life Improvements:**
Mod Menu + Mouse Tweaks + Model Gap Fix + Pick Up Notifier – Interface and interaction enhancements for smoother gameplay.

- Capes + No Chat Reports + Packet Fixer – Safe multiplayer tweaks and visual features.
- Very Many Players + Placeholder API – Optimize gameplay in high-player environments.

**📦 Client-side & Server-safe:**
This modpack is intended to be client-side (unless a specific mod notes otherwise), making it safe for use on most servers, including vanilla multiplayer. No content-altering gameplay changes—just pure optimizations and aesthetic improvements.

**🔗 External Resources:**
All mods are sourced from reputable platforms like Modrinth. Here are some examples:

- Sodium
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Lithium

**✅ Why Use This Pack?**

✨ Keeps Minecraft vanilla-feeling while making it look and run better
💻 Works great on low-end systems
🕹️ Ideal for PvP, survival, creative, and multiplayer
🎮 Built for casual players, streamers, and builders who want quality without clutter
